summary: Full frontend regression of Kontengrafi Invoko-style landing page. All 35 functional/visual checks PASSED. Landing renders in correct section order (Navbarâ†’Heroâ†’BesideYouâ†’PermissionCardsâ†’Processâ†’Testimonialsâ†’Plansâ†’FAQâ†’FinalCtaâ†’Footer). Hero shows the exact tagline 'A helping hand behind every post.' with the static pinwheel inline-overlapping the letter 'o' of 'post', plus the 'kami bantu' Caveat handwriting + sketch arrow. UGC + commercial-content positioning underlined; no fashion/F&B niche positioning anywhere on page. 3 Permission cards (voice/shoot/approval) render with iOS-style toggle (bg rgb(42,79,224) = #2A4FE0, white knob right) and 'Allowed for Kontengrafi' sub-status x3. No spinning animation in DOM (animate-spin / animate-spin-slow count = 0). Process shows 01/02/03 blue badges with correct titles, Testimonials marquee + 3 cards, Plans Grow card highlighted with dark #0B1120 bg + 'Paling Populer' badge + md:-translate-y-3 (-12px). FAQ has 8 items, first Q matches spec and answer lists fashion/F&B/beauty/SaaS/UMKM/e-commerce examples. FinalCta has WhatsApp/Instagram/Email + Ask ChatGPT/Claude/Perplexity all target=_blank. Body bg = rgb(244,246,250) (#F4F6FA), H1 color rgb(11,17,32) (#0B1120). Only Inter + Caveat (intentional) fonts; no Instrument Serif / Cabinet / IBM Plex. No horizontal overflow at 1920 or 414. Mobile hamburger toggles nav menu correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Hero.jsx imports BRAND from @/lib/brand but never uses it â€” dead import, safe to remove.
Minor: <link href='Caveat font' rel='stylesheet'> is embedded inside Hero JSX body; would be cleaner in index.html <head> or index.css @import to avoid CLS on first paint.

Minor: index.css has --background HSL token (218 33% 97%) which resolves close to #F4F6FA â€” consistent, but @layer base sets body bg twice (once via .body{} explicit and once via @apply bg-background). Not breaking, but redundant.
Cosmetic: Plans CTAs for all 3 plans use the same waLink (same WhatsApp prefill). Consider differentiating prefill text per plan for analytics later â€” not a bug.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Page is fully aligned to Invoko.ai design tokens â€” Inter only, #F4F6FA bg, #0B1120 headings, #2A4FE0 primary blue, dotted grid, iOS toggles, static pinwheel mark (no spin). Kontengrafi positioning is now general 'UGC + commercial content for any brand'; fashion & F&B only appear as INDUSTRY EXAMPLES inside FAQ-1 answer (which is correct per spec). If new iterations come, retest with the same Playwright script above; all data-testid selectors are stable.
